text.title: React Hooks Examples
text.summary: Correct useState, useEffect, useCallback, useMemo, useRef, useReducer, Context, and custom hook patterns.

example.note: useState(() => compute()) runs only on mount. Functional updates in setCount prevent stale closure bugs inside intervals.
AbortController prevents stale responses when url changes. AbortError is silenced because it is expected behavior.
Cleanup clears the timer on every value change. Both deps listed explicitly.
Discriminated union on Action.type prevents typo'd action dispatches. All cases handled explicitly.

text.reference: Strict-Mode-safe useFetch with typed status states
